markdown:
The business field of KWT GmbH is manufacturing pipes and fittings for water supply in several plastic materials which positions the company in the construction value chain as a construction material supplier and manufacturer. With the premium manufacturer KESSEL - Leading in drainage - it exists a close and long partnership. With this experience of decades we will transport our success to the future.

**K-Aqua - Leading in water supply.**

html:
The business field of KWT GmbH is manufacturing pipes and fittings for water supply in several plastic materials which positions the company in the construction value chain as a construction material supplier and manufacturer. With the premium manufacturer KESSEL - Leading in drainage - it exists a close and long partnership. With this experience of decades we will transport our success to the future.

K-Aqua - Leading in water supply.

json.company_description: The business field of KWT GmbH is manufacturing pipes and fittings for water supply in several plastic materials, positioning the company in the construction value chain as a construction material supplier and manufacturer. KWT GmbH has a close and long partnership with the premium manufacturer KESSEL, leading in drainage. With decades of experience, the company aims to transport its success into the future. K-Aqua is also highlighted as a leader in water supply.

summary: KWT GmbH specializes in manufacturing pipes and fittings for water supply using various plastic materials, positioning itself as a supplier in the construction value chain. The company has a long-standing partnership with KESSEL, a premium manufacturer known for drainage solutions, which helps leverage their decades of experience for future success. Their brand K-Aqua is recognized as a leader in water supply.
